div.h1: Looks like the place you wanted to go does not exist
div.p: Or we just missed the semicolon again. Either way — click below so we can get you back on track.

class i extends HTMLElement{authFrame;authDomainOrigin;onSessionExpired;constructor(){super(),this.attachShadow({mode:"open"}),this.handleMessage=this.handleMessage.bind(this),this.authFrame=null,this.authDomainOrigin=""}connectedCallback(){if(!this.shadowRoot){console.error("Shadow DOM not initialized.");return}this.authDomainOrigin=this.getAttribute("auth-domain")||"https://access.my.tomtom.com",this.shadowRoot.innerHTML=`
`,this.authFrame=this.shadowRoot.getElementById("auth-frame"),this.setupEventListeners()}setupEventListeners(){window.addEventListener("message",this.handleMessage)}handleMessage(e){if(e.origin!==this.authDomainOrigin)return;const{type:t,data:a}=e.data;switch(t){case"session_expired":this.onSessionExpired&&this.onSessionExpired();break;case"auth_error":console.error("Authentication error:",a);break;default:console.warn("Unknown message type:",t)}}postMessageToAuthChannel(e){if(!this.authFrame||!this.authFrame.contentWindow){console.error("Auth frame not loaded or not available.");return}this.authFrame.onload=()=>{if(!this.authFrame||!this.authFrame.contentWindow){console.error("Auth frame not loaded or not available.");return}this.authFrame.contentWindow.postMessage(e,this.authDomainOrigin)},this.authFrame.contentWindow&&this.authFrame.contentWindow.postMessage(e,this.authDomainOrigin)}disconnectedCallback(){window.removeEventListener("message",this.handleMessage)}}customElements.define("tomtom-auth",i);
